failure_signature: Vibration levels spike (bearing wear), high temperature near main drive spindle
action_taken: Replaced rotary bearing B-10 and adjusted rotor alignment

failure_signature: Overheating shutdown triggered, core temperature reached 99.1°C
action_taken: Cleaned heat exchanger lines and replaced cooling fan F-8

failure_signature: Pressure valve leak detected, line pressure fluctuated between 80-140 PSI
action_taken: Replaced pressure valve V-12 and high-temp gasket

failure_signature: Rotor locking and screeching noise, motor pulling double current
action_taken: Complete bearing rebuild, replaced hydraulic pump seal
Tightened drive belt, greased secondary drive gear linkages

failure_signature: Thermal overload sensor tripped due to radiator blockage
action_taken: Cleared intake vents, ran flush cycle on radiators
